scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.start: bash -c 'export MONGO_URL="${MONGO_URL:-mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017}" DB_NAME="${DB_NAME:-asr_dev}" USE_IN_MEMORY_MONGO="${USE_IN_MEMORY_MONGO:-true}" CORS_ORIGINS="${CORS_ORIGINS:-*}" PYTHONPATH=backend; python -m uvicorn server:app --app-dir backend --host 0.0.0.0 --port "${PORT:-5000}"'
